case_title: JOSE L. PACHECO VS. EZELLE MORRIS DAVID DEANS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,070.00 FILED BY PACHECO, JOSE L. AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, EZELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40-WAIVED) SERVED MAY-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, EZELLE
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACHECO, JOSE L.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF PACHECO, JOSE L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-11-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF JOSE L. PACHECO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EZELLE GAINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATED IN OPEN COURT THAT HIS LEGAL NAME IS EZELLE GAINES. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $100.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MADE PAYMENT OF $100.00 IN CASH TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
